evals.description: Triggers when user asks about designing a ticket triage system
evals.prompt: How should I set up a ticket triage system for our growing support team?

evals.description: Triggers when user asks about SLA targets
evals.prompt: We need to define SLA targets for our customer support. What should our first response and resolution times be?

evals.description: Triggers when user asks about building a macro library
evals.prompt: I want to create a library of canned responses for our support agents. Where do I start?

evals.description: Correctly classifies a critical service outage ticket as P1
evals.prompt: Our payment processing is completely down and customers cannot check out. What priority should this ticket be and what is our FRT target?

evals.description: Designs a tiered escalation workflow with clear handoff requirements
evals.prompt: Design an escalation workflow for our support team. We have L1 generalists and L2 specialists.

evals.description: Provides correct SLA breach alerting guidance with percentage thresholds
evals.prompt: How should we alert our team when SLA breaches are about to happen?

evals.description: Identifies root cause of CSAT drop after introducing macros
evals.prompt: Our CSAT dropped after we introduced canned responses. What might be wrong with our macros?

evals.description: Recommends correct queue health metrics to track
evals.prompt: What metrics should I track to know if my support queue is healthy?

evals.description: Warns against measuring agents purely on ticket close speed
evals.prompt: We are going to measure our support team purely on how fast they close tickets. Good idea?

evals.description: Explains VIP support protocol with correct routing and response times
evals.prompt: We just signed a $200k enterprise deal. How should we handle their support tickets differently?

evals.description: Does not invent support tool APIs or fictional platform methods
evals.prompt: What is the standard SupportOps.triageTicket() API method for auto-triage in enterprise helpdesks?

evals.description: References macro-templates.md when user asks for ready-to-use templates
evals.prompt: Give me a complete set of macro templates I can use for our support team right now.
